data.name: AntigravityOAuthDetail
data.value: For IDE-off refresh, create an OAuth Desktop app in Google Cloud, then paste your own {0} and {1} here. They are securely encrypted on this device.

data.name: AntigravityOAuthSaved
data.value: Client values are securely encrypted and saved.

data.name: AntigravityOAuthLoadFailed
data.value: Could not load saved client values.

data.name: AntigravityOAuthSavedExists
data.value: Client values are securely encrypted and saved.

data.name: AntigravityMissingOAuthClientError
data.value: Antigravity token refresh needs your OAuth client values. Open {0}, save your {1} and {2}, then refresh again.

data.name: AntigravityCloudSetupError
data.value: Sign in to Antigravity with your Google account first. If Cloud is unavailable, open the Antigravity IDE and refresh again.

data.name: AntigravityOAuthGuideOpenFailed
data.value: Could not open the setup guide.

data.name: GuidanceRefreshingDetail
data.value: Your limit status will update in a moment.

data.name: GuidanceRefreshingAction
data.value: Previous data stays visible when available.

data.name: GuidanceNoDataDetail
data.value: No usage data is loaded yet.

data.name: GuidanceNoDataAction
data.value: Use Refresh All to check your current limits.

data.name: GuidanceFailedDetail
data.value: Last known data remains visible where possible.

data.name: GuidanceFailedAction
data.value: Try Refresh All again or check provider setup.

data.name: GuidanceStaleTitle
data.value: Usage may be out of date

data.name: GuidanceStaleDetail
data.value: The last saved data is still shown.

data.name: GuidanceFreshDetail
data.value: All tracked models are reporting normally.

data.name: SettingsPanelDetailText
data.value: Adjust dashboard behavior and support actions in one place.

data.name: ModelSettingsDetailText
data.value: Choose which providers appear on the dashboard.

data.name: LanguageSettingsDetailText
data.value: Follow the system language by default, or choose a specific dashboard language.

data.name: ThemeSystemHintText
data.value: Auto follows your Windows app theme.

data.name: LimitWarningSettingsDetailText
data.value: Remaining-limit providers alert below the threshold. Usage-based providers alert above the matching used percent.

data.name: UpdateCheckDetailText
data.value: Check whether a newer release is available.

data.name: DiagnosticLogDetailText
data.value: Found a bug? Copy this log and send it to the developer.

data.name: TrayLogCopiedDetail
data.value: Paste it into your bug report if refresh keeps failing.

data.name: LimitProfileToolTipCodex
data.value: Automatically shows standard Codex windows and named extra buckets when available.

data.name: LimitProfileToolTipClaude
data.value: Shows Claude OAuth current session plus all-models and Sonnet-only weekly limits when available.

data.name: LimitProfileToolTipAntigravity
data.value: Shows each Antigravity/Gemini model quota separately when available.

data.name: NoValueBadgeToolTipText
data.value: No quota value could be displayed. Check the adjacent status badge for the reason.

data.name: SourceBadgeCloudToolTip
data.value: Usage data was fetched from Antigravity Cloud.

data.name: SourceBadgeIdeFallbackToolTip
data.value: Cloud was unreachable, so usage data was fetched from the local Antigravity IDE fallback.

data.name: OAuthClientOriginTooltipPrefix
data.value: OAuth client used for token refresh

data.name: AntigravityOAuthActiveClientNone
data.value: Token refresh client: not set (uses IDE fallback when running · otherwise refresh fails when expired)

data.name: AntigravityCauseTimeout
data.value: the request did not return in time

data.name: AntigravityCauseNoEndpoint
data.value: no running Antigravity IDE was found

data.name: AntigravityCauseEndpointNoQuota
data.value: the IDE responded but did not return quota

data.name: AntigravityCauseInstallNotDetected
data.value: Antigravity does not appear to be installed

data.name: AntigravityCauseOAuthClientSecretMissing
data.value: OAuth client secret for token refresh is missing (open the IDE or save values in Settings > Antigravity OAuth)

data.name: AntigravityCauseOAuthClientIdMissing
data.value: OAuth client ID for token refresh is missing (open the IDE or save values in Settings > Antigravity OAuth)

data.name: ToolTipNoValue
data.value: The provider returned no usage value.

data.name: ToolTipOAuthSetupRequired
data.value: To refresh Cloud auth, save your own client ID and secret in Settings > Antigravity OAuth. If the IDE is running, Quota Watch will use the fallback path automatically.

data.name: ToolTipCloudTimeoutAntigravity
data.value: Cloud refresh timed out. Open Antigravity IDE if you want to try the IDE fallback path, then refresh again.

data.name: ToolTipAuthRequired
data.value: Authentication is missing or expired. Sign in again, then refresh.

data.name: ToolTipAntigravityStartLogin
data.value: Open Antigravity and make sure you are signed in with your Google account, then refresh.

data.name: ToolTipCodexInstallLogin
data.value: Codex is not installed or the login has expired. Install Codex or sign in again, then refresh.

data.name: ToolTipAntigravityInstallLogin
data.value: Antigravity is not installed or the login has expired. Install Antigravity or sign in again, then refresh.

data.name: ToolTipClaudeInstallLogin
data.value: Claude Code is not installed or the login has expired. Install Claude Code or sign in again, then refresh.

data.name: ToolTipGenericFailure
data.value: Usage could not be loaded. Try refreshing again, and if it keeps failing, copy the diagnostic log and report it.

data.name: ToolTipIdeUnavailableNoCloud
data.value: Quota Watch tried IDE failover, but it could not continue because no running Antigravity IDE was found. Install or start Antigravity IDE, then refresh.

data.name: ToolTipIdeUnavailableCloudFailed
data.value: Cloud lookup failed, so Quota Watch tried IDE failover. It could not continue because no running Antigravity IDE was found. Install or start Antigravity IDE, then refresh.

data.name: LastErrorClaudeInstallLogin
data.value: Claude Code is not installed or the login has expired. Install Claude Code or sign in again, then refresh.

data.name: LastErrorNetwork
data.value: The provider could not be reached. Check your network and try again.

data.name: LastErrorParse
data.value: The provider response could not be read. Refresh again after the provider is stable.

data.name: LastErrorNoQuotaGeneric
data.value: The provider responded, but no quota data was available.

data.name: LastErrorNoQuotaAntigravityNoEndpoint
data.value: No Antigravity quota data was available. IDE fallback could not be attempted because no IDE endpoint was found.

data.name: LastErrorNoQuotaAntigravityIdeAttempted
data.value: No Antigravity quota data was available. IDE fallback was attempted but returned no quota data.

data.name: LastErrorNoQuotaAntigravityDefault
data.value: No Antigravity quota data was available.

data.name: LastErrorTimeout
data.value: The usage refresh took too long. Try refreshing again in a moment.

data.name: LastErrorAntigravityTimeout
data.value: Antigravity Cloud refresh timed out. Open Antigravity IDE if you want to retry through the IDE fallback path.

data.name: SetupHintAntigravity
data.value: Automatic: Cloud first, then IDE fallback. Cloud uses stored Antigravity OAuth tokens. Expired tokens need stored OAuth client values or explicit ANTIGRAVITY_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID and ANTIGRAVITY_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET to refresh without the IDE.

data.name: SetupHintClaude
data.value: Uses Claude Code OAuth credentials. Sign in with Claude Code once; Claude Code does not need to stay open.

data.name: LimitWarningSuppressWeekly
data.value: Don't show this weekly alert again
